title: CoverageState
description: Exploit DB -> Orchestrator. Per-category verdict counts for one (target_id, target_version), plus open (unresolved) findings -- the data substrate the Orchestrator reads to decide what to attack next. Produced by db.get_coverage_state(), not hand-built by any agent.

categories.description: Keyed by attack_category. Every category from the enum is present, including ones with zero attempts -- a category with no rows is a visible gap, not silently absent.

open_findings.description: Confirmed/partial exploit_records with no published vulnerability_report yet.
